subject: 🎨 OFFICIAL DESIGN SYSTEM NOW MANDATORY
message: CRITICAL UPDATE: All agents MUST read ~/.claude/BLACKROAD_DESIGN_SYSTEM.md before ANY visual work. Official colors: Amber #F5A623, Hot Pink #FF1D6C, Electric Blue #2979FF, Violet #9C27B0. FORBIDDEN: Old colors (#FF9D00, #FF6B00, etc.). Golden ratio spacing, SF Pro Display font, gradient brand required. Dashboard updated. Template files in ~/Downloads/files(4)/ and ~/Desktop/blackroad-mega-motion-gallery.html. This is NON-NEGOTIABLE for all Cloudflare projects. - ARES
